---
title: "Curriculum vitæ"
description: "Kai Cooper's CV"
date: 2025-03-17
title-block-banner: "#771C6D"
published-title: Last updated
cv:
  pdf: "KC_CV_Mar2026.pdf"
---

```{=html}
<style>
#title-block-header .description {
    display: none;
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<style>
.embed-container {
    position: relative;
    padding-bottom: 129%;
    height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    max-width: 100%;
}

.embed-container iframe,
.embed-container object,
.embed-container embed {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<p class="text-center">
  <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg cv-download" href="KC_CV_Mar2026.pdf" target="_blank">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-file-arrow-down"></i>&ensp;Download current CV
  </a>
</p>

<div class="embed-container">
  <iframe src="KC_CV_Mar2026.pdf" style="border: 0.5px"></iframe>
</div>
```
